---
title: ''
output: 
  html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
params:
  year_choice:
    label: "Year"
    value: 2021
    input: slider
    min: 2019
    max: 2030
    step: 1
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
```

<div align="center"> 

![](sp-logo.png){width=25%}

# Cases and Blocks Signed-out by Pathologist: <br>Jan 2019 -- Sep 2020

<br>

```{r import-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
#import and clean data for all cases
# All signed out cases raw data -----
cases_raw <-
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "^(\\d{4})(-cases)\\.xls",
             full.names = TRUE) %>%
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows()

# AP cases and blocks raw data -----
ap_raw <-
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "^(\\d{4})(-\\d.+)\\.xls",
             full.names = TRUE) %>%
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows()

# Intraoperative consultations raw data -----
iop_raw20 <-
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "([2020q3])(-iop)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>%
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows()

iop_raw21 <-
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "([2021q1])(-iop)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>%
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows()

# Internal consultations raw data -----
iconsult_raw <-
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "(\\d+)(-iconsult)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>%
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>% 
  bind_rows()

# Bone marrow cases raw data -----
marrow_raw <-
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "(\\d+)(-marrow)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>%
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows() 

# Flow cytometry cases raw data -----
flow_raw <- 
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "(\\d+)(-flow)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>% 
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>% 
  bind_rows() %>% 
  filter(!str_detect('Pathologist', "-|Total"))

# Peripheral blood reviews raw data -----
pblood <- 
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "(\\d+)(-peripheral-blood)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>% 
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>% 
  bind_rows() %>% 
  filter(!str_detect(Pathologist, "-|Total"))

# Urine FISH cases -----
ufish <- 
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "(\\d+)(-urine-fish)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>% 
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>% 
  bind_rows() %>% 
  filter(!str_detect(Pathologist, "-|Total"))

# VIAS cases----
vias <- 
  list.files(path = here::here("data"),
             pattern = "(\\d+)(-vias)(\\.xls)",
             full.names = TRUE) %>% 
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, simplify = FALSE) %>% 
  bind_rows()

#Part A 2021-----

partA_2021_raw <-
  list.files(
    path = here::here("data"), 
    pattern = "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-partA",
    full.names = TRUE
  ) %>% 
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, 
         simplify = FALSE, 
        )  %>% 
  dplyr::bind_rows()

# Active CPT-----
active_cpt <- 
  readxl::read_excel(
    here::here('data','active-cpt-codes.xlsx'))

#Total CPT -----
cpt_raw <- 
  list.files(
    path = here::here("data"), 
    pattern = "(\\d+)(-tat)(\\.xls)",
    full.names = TRUE
  ) %>% 
  sapply(readxl::read_excel, 
         simplify = FALSE, 
        )  %>% 
  dplyr::bind_rows()
```

```{r clean-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Clean all cases data -----
cases_clean <- 
  cases_raw %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    !`Pathologist`, 
    names_to = "ddate",
    values_to = "n"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    ddate = mdy(ddate),
    yr = year(ddate),
    mth = month(ddate, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  filter(ddate < "2020-10-01",
         !Pathologist %in% c("Brooke Caufield, MD", "Joseph Lillis, MD", 
           "Laurel Stearns, DO")) %>% 
  group_by(yr, mth, Pathologist) %>% 
  summarize(
    Cases = as.numeric(sum(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  ungroup()

# Clean AP cases and blocks data -----
ap_clean <- 
  ap_raw %>% 
  mutate(
    `Create Date` = mdy(`Create Date`),
    yr = year(`Create Date`),
    mth = month(`Create Date`, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  filter(
    `Create Date` < "2020-10-01",
    status != "Deleted", 
  ) %>% 
  group_by(yr, mth, `Primary Pathologist`) %>% 
  summarize(
    Cases = as.numeric(sum(n())),
    Blocks = as.numeric(sum(Blocks))
  )  %>% 
  ungroup()

# Clean Part A cases -----

partA_2021 <- 
  partA_2021_raw %>% 
  select(1:3) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  mutate(
    year = year(Date),
    month = month(Date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  select(-Date) %>% 
  group_by(year,month, Name) %>% 
  summarize(
    Cases = sum(Hours)) %>% 
  relocate(Name, .before=year) %>% 
  ungroup()

#Clean Iconsult ----

iconsult_clean <- 
  iconsult_raw %>% 
  mutate(
    `Collected date` = mdy(`Collected date`),
    yr = year(`Collected date`),
    mth = month(`Collected date`, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)
  )

#Clean IOP -----

iop_raw20 <- 
  iop_raw20 %>% 
  mutate(
    `Collected date` = ymd(`Collected date`),
    yr = year(`Collected date`),
    mth = month(`Collected date`, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)
  )

iop_raw21 <- 
  iop_raw21 %>% 
  mutate(
    `Collected date` = mdy(`Collected date`),
    yr = year(`Collected date`),
    mth = month(`Collected date`, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)
  )

iop_clean <- 
  full_join(iop_raw20, iop_raw21) 

#Clean CPT -----
cpt_clean <- 
  cpt_raw %>% 
  select(PATHOLOGIST, 'RESULT ID', Create, CPTS) %>% 
  separate_rows(CPTS, convert = TRUE) %>% 
   mutate(
    Create = mdy_hm(Create),
    yr = year(Create),
    mth = month(Create, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  select(-Create) %>% 
  filter(PATHOLOGIST != c('Admin, Summit', NA))

```

```{r standardize names, echo=FALSE}
#Cases Clean 
path_names <- cases_clean$Pathologist

fn_ln <- gsub("(.*),.*", "\\1", path_names)

firstname = sapply(strsplit(fn_ln, ' '), function(x) x[1])

lastname = sapply(strsplit(fn_ln, ' '), function(x) x[length(x)])

cases_clean$Pathologist <- paste(lastname, firstname, sep = ', ')

#vias

ln_fn <- tibble(lastname, firstname) %>% 
            unique()
  
vias$`VIAS PATH`= str_to_title(vias$`VIAS PATH`)

vias <- merge(vias, ln_fn, by.x= 'VIAS PATH', by.y = 'lastname') 

vias_fn = vias$firstname

vias_ln = vias$`VIAS PATH`

vias$`VIAS PATH` <- paste(vias_ln, vias_fn, sep = ', ')

vias <- select(vias, -firstname)


#Iconsult 

iconsult_pathnames <- iconsult_clean$`Consulting Pathologist`

iconsult_fnln <- gsub("(.*),.*", "\\1", iconsult_pathnames)

iconsult_firstname = sapply(strsplit(iconsult_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[1])

iconsult_lastname = sapply(strsplit(iconsult_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[length(x)])

iconsult_clean$`Consulting Pathologist` <- 
  paste(iconsult_lastname, iconsult_firstname, sep = ', ')

#Flow Raw
fr_pathnames <- flow_raw$Pathologist

fr_fnln <- gsub("(.*),.*", "\\1", fr_pathnames)

fr_firstname = sapply(strsplit(fr_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[1])

fr_lastname = sapply(strsplit(fr_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[length(x)])

flow_raw$Pathologist <- paste(fr_lastname, fr_firstname, sep = ', ')


#Pblood 
pb_pathnames <- pblood$Pathologist

pb_fnln <- gsub("(.*),.*", "\\1", pb_pathnames)

pb_firstname = sapply(strsplit(pb_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[1])

pb_lastname = sapply(strsplit(pb_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[length(x)])

pblood$Pathologist <- paste(pb_lastname, pb_firstname, sep = ', ')

#Ufish

uf_pathnames <- ufish$Pathologist

uf_fnln <- gsub("(.*),.*", "\\1", uf_pathnames)

uf_firstname = sapply(strsplit(uf_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[1])

uf_lastname = sapply(strsplit(uf_fnln, ' '), function(x) x[length(x)])

ufish$Pathologist <- paste(uf_lastname, uf_firstname, sep = ', ')

#Part A names

partA_pathnames <- partA_2021$Name

pA_fn_ln <- gsub("(.*),.*", "\\1", partA_pathnames)

pA_firstname = sapply(strsplit(pA_fn_ln, ' '), function(x) x[1])

pA_lastname = sapply(strsplit(pA_fn_ln, ' '), function(x) x[length(x)])

partA_2021$Name <- paste(pA_lastname, pA_firstname, sep = ', ')

partA_2021$Name[partA_2021$Name == "Bee, Chris"] <- "Bee, Christopher"

partA_2021$Name[partA_2021$Name == "Hamner, Wentzell"] <- "Hamner, H"

partA_2021$Name[partA_2021$Name == "Salisbury, Cathy"] <- "Salisbury, Catherine"

partA_2021$Name[partA_2021$Name == "Walts, Mike"] <- "Walts, Michael"
```

```{r anonymize names, echo=FALSE}
library(stringi)

all_pathnames <- merge(cpt_clean, ap_clean, by.x = 'PATHOLOGIST', by.y = 'Primary Pathologist', all = TRUE)

path_namekey <- all_pathnames %>% 
  select(`PATHOLOGIST`) %>% 
  unique()%>%
  rename(Pathologist = PATHOLOGIST) %>% 
  mutate(Path_num = stri_rand_strings(26,4, pattern = "[0-9]"))

#Cases Clean 
cases_clean <- merge(
              cases_clean, path_namekey, 
              by= 'Pathologist')
#flow raw
flow_raw <- merge(
            flow_raw, path_namekey, 
            by= 'Pathologist')

#Pblood
pblood <- merge(
          pblood, path_namekey, 
          by= 'Pathologist')
#ufish
ufish <- merge(
          ufish, path_namekey, 
          by= 'Pathologist')
#ap clean
ap_clean<- merge(
            ap_clean,path_namekey, 
            by.x = "Primary Pathologist", by.y = "Pathologist", 
            all.x = TRUE)
#i consult
iconsult_raw <- merge(
                iconsult_raw, path_namekey, 
                by.x = "Consulting Pathologist", by.y = "Pathologist", 
                all.x = TRUE)
#iop 
iop_clean <- merge(
            iop_clean, path_namekey, 
            by.x = "IntraOp Path", by.y = "Pathologist", 
            all.x = TRUE)
#marrow 
marrow_raw <- merge(
              marrow_raw, path_namekey, 
              by.x = "PATHOLOGIST", by.y = "Pathologist", 
              all.x = TRUE)
#VIAS
vias <- merge(
        vias, path_namekey, 
        by.x = "VIAS PATH", by.y = "Pathologist", 
        all.x = TRUE)
#Part A
partA_2021 <- merge(
              partA_2021, path_namekey, 
              by.x = "Name", by.y = "Pathologist", 
              all.x = TRUE)

#CPT 
cpt_clean <- merge(
              cpt_clean, path_namekey, 
              by.x = "PATHOLOGIST", by.y = "Pathologist", 
              all.x = TRUE)

```

```{r pivot-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Pivot data to wide format for tabulation
cases_wide <-  
  cases_clean %>% 
  filter(Cases > 0) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = mth,
    values_from = Cases
  ) %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(
    Total = sum(
      Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ap_cases <- 
  ap_clean %>% 
  select(-Blocks) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = mth, values_from = Cases) %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(
    Total = sum(
      Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ap_blocks <- 
  ap_clean %>% 
  select(-Cases) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = mth, values_from = Blocks) %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(
    Total = sum(
      Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

partA_cases <- 
  partA_2021 %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = month, values_from = Cases) %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(
    Total = sum(
      Jan, Feb, Mar, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) 
```

```{r summary-fns, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# define summary row functions
fns_labels <- 
  list(
    Median = ~median(., na.rm = TRUE),
    `Total` = ~sum(., na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r marrow CPT, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# clean marrow and isolate cpt 

marrow_clean <- 
  marrow_raw %>% 
  select(c(PATHOLOGIST,`RESULT ID`, CPTS, Path_num)) %>% 
  group_by(PATHOLOGIST) %>% 
  separate_rows(CPTS, convert = TRUE) 

marrow_cpt <- 
  marrow_clean %>% 
  count(CPTS, PATHOLOGIST, Path_num) %>% 
  merge(active_cpt, by.x = 'CPTS', by.y = 'cpt', all.x = TRUE) %>% 
  relocate(CPTS, .before = n) %>%
  mutate(total = n * rvu) %>% 
  rename(cpt_count = n )

```

```{r total CPT, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}

cpt_total <- 
  cpt_clean %>% 
  count(CPTS, PATHOLOGIST, Path_num) %>% 
  merge(active_cpt, by.x = 'CPTS', by.y = 'cpt', all.x = TRUE) %>% 
  relocate(CPTS, .before = n) %>%
  mutate(total = n * rvu) %>% 
  rename(cpt_count = n )
  
```
## 2019 All Cases

```{r 2019-cases, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# 2019 Monthly case counts by pathologist
cases_wide %>% 
  filter(yr == 2019)%>% 
  select(-yr) %>% 
  rename(rowname = Pathologist) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(groupname_col = "yr") %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = 
      vars(Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
        rows = Total >= median(Total))
    ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = median(Total) > Total)
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(85)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 (Q1 -- Q3) All Cases

```{r 2020-cases, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# 2020 Monthly case counts by pathologist
cases_wide %>% 
  filter(yr == 2020) %>% 
  select(-yr) %>% 
  rename(rowname = Pathologist) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(groupname_col = "yr") %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = 
      vars(Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = median(Total) > Total)
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(85)
  )
```
<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2021 Part A Q1

```{r PartA-2021, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
partA_cases %>% 
  select(-year) %>% 
  rename(rowname = 'Name') %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(groupname_col = "year") %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = 
      vars(Jan, Feb, Mar, Total),
    fns = fns_labels, 
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals= 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = median(Total) > Total)
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(85)
  )
```
<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2019 Anatomic Pathology Cases

```{r AP2019-cases, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# 2019 Monthly case counts by pathologist
ap_cases %>% 
  filter(yr == 2019) %>% 
  select(-yr) %>% 
  rename(rowname = `Primary Pathologist`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(groupname_col = "yr") %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = 
      vars(Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = median(Total) > Total)
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(85)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 (Q1 -- Q3) Anatomic Pathology Cases
```{r AP2020-cases, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# 2020 Monthly case counts by pathologist
ap_cases %>% 
  filter(yr == 2020) %>% 
  select(-yr) %>% 
  rename(rowname = `Primary Pathologist`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(groupname_col = "yr") %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = 
      vars(Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = median(Total) > Total)
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(85)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2019 Anatomic Pathology Blocks

```{r AP2019-blocks, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# monthly block count by pathologist
ap_blocks %>% 
  filter(yr == 2019) %>% 
  select(-yr) %>% 
  rename(rowname = `Primary Pathologist`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(groupname_col = "yr") %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = 
      vars(Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = median(Total) > Total)
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(85)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 (Q1 -- Q3) Anatomic Pathology Blocks

```{r AP2020-blocks, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# monthly block count by pathologist
ap_blocks %>% 
  filter(yr == 2020) %>% 
  select(-yr) %>% 
  rename(rowname = `Primary Pathologist`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(groupname_col = "yr") %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = 
      vars(Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = median(Total) > Total)
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(85)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 Q3 Intraoperative Consultations Performed

```{r intra-op 20, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
iop_clean %>% 
  filter(yr == 2020) %>% 
  select(`IntraOp Path`, `IntraOp Type`) %>% 
  group_by(`IntraOp Type`, `IntraOp Path`) %>% 
  summarize(n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = `IntraOp Type`, values_from = n) %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(
    Total = sum(`FNA Adequacy`, Frozen, Gross, `Touch Prep`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "IntraOp Path",
    groupname_col = "IntraOp Type"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(`FNA Adequacy`, Frozen, Gross, `Touch Prep`, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`FNA Adequacy`),
  #     rows = `FNA Adequacy` >= median(`FNA Adequacy`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`FNA Adequacy`),
  #     rows = `FNA Adequacy` < median(`FNA Adequacy`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Frozen),
  #     rows = Frozen >= median(Frozen, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Frozen),
  #     rows = Frozen < median(Frozen, na.rm = TRUE)) 
  # ) %>% 
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Gross),
  #     rows = Gross >= median(Gross, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Gross),
  #     rows = Gross < median(Gross, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>% 
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`Touch Prep`),
  #     rows = `Touch Prep` >= median(`Touch Prep`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`Touch Prep`),
  #     rows = `Touch Prep` < median(`Touch Prep`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total < median(Total, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>


## 2021 Q1 Intraoperative Consultations Performed

```{r intra-op 21, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
iop_clean %>% 
  filter(yr =='2021') %>% 
  select(`IntraOp Path`, `IntraOp Type`) %>% 
  group_by(`IntraOp Type`, `IntraOp Path`) %>% 
  summarize(n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = `IntraOp Type`, values_from = n) %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(
    Total = sum(`FNA Adequacy`, Frozen, Gross, `Touch Prep`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  arrange(desc(Total)) %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "IntraOp Path",
    groupname_col = "IntraOp Type"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(`FNA Adequacy`, Frozen, Gross, `Touch Prep`, Total),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`FNA Adequacy`),
  #     rows = `FNA Adequacy` >= median(`FNA Adequacy`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`FNA Adequacy`),
  #     rows = `FNA Adequacy` < median(`FNA Adequacy`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Frozen),
  #     rows = Frozen >= median(Frozen, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Frozen),
  #     rows = Frozen < median(Frozen, na.rm = TRUE)) 
  # ) %>% 
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Gross),
  #     rows = Gross >= median(Gross, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(Gross),
  #     rows = Gross < median(Gross, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>% 
  # tab_style(
  #   style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`Touch Prep`),
  #     rows = `Touch Prep` >= median(`Touch Prep`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>%
  # tab_style(
  #   style = list(
  #     cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
  #     cell_text(color = "white")
  #   ),
  #   locations = cells_body(
  #     columns = vars(`Touch Prep`),
  #     rows = `Touch Prep` < median(`Touch Prep`, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total >= median(Total, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(Total),
      rows = Total < median(Total, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 Q3 Internal Quality Control

### Internal Consulations Performed

```{r internal-qc, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Multiple pathologists can consult on one case. 
# Consults performed is the sum of unique combinations of accession number 
# and Consulting Pathologist

iconsult_clean%>% 
  filter(yr == 2020) %>% 
  select(Accession, `Consulting Pathologist`) %>% 
  rename(Pathologist = `Consulting Pathologist`) %>% 
  group_by(Pathologist, Accession) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(Pathologist) %>% 
  summarize(n = sum(n())) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "Pathologist"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
tab_style(
  style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  locations = cells_body(
    columns = vars(n),
    rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2021 Internal Quality Control

### Internal Consulations Performed

```{r internal-qc-21, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Multiple pathologists can consult on one case. 
# Consults performed is the sum of unique combinations of accession number 
# and Consulting Pathologist

iconsult_clean%>% 
  filter(yr == 2021) %>% 
  select(Accession, `Consulting Pathologist`) %>% 
  rename(Pathologist = `Consulting Pathologist`) %>% 
  group_by(Pathologist, Accession) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(Pathologist) %>% 
  summarize(n = sum(n())) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "Pathologist"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
tab_style(
  style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
  locations = cells_body(
    columns = vars(n),
    rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 Q3 Bone Marrow Cases

```{r bone-marrow, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Bone marrow cases
# Summaries are per case, not per specimen
# Bone marrow interpretations are the sum of unique combinations of 
# Result ID and Pathologist

marrow_raw %>% 
  select(PATHOLOGIST, `RESULT ID`, Create) %>% 
  rename(
    `Result ID` = `RESULT ID`
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    create_date = as_date(mdy_hm(Create))
  ) %>% 
  filter(
    !is.na(PATHOLOGIST),
    create_date >= "2020-07-01" & 
      create_date <= "2020-09-30"
  ) %>% 
  group_by(PATHOLOGIST, `Result ID`) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(PATHOLOGIST) %>% 
  summarize(n = sum(n(), na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "PATHOLOGIST"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2021 Q1 Bone Marrow Cases

```{r bone-marrow-21, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Bone marrow cases
# Summaries are per case, not per specimen
# Bone marrow interpretations are the sum of unique combinations of 
# Result ID and Pathologist

marrow_raw %>% 
  select(PATHOLOGIST, `RESULT ID`, Create) %>% 
  rename(
    `Result ID` = `RESULT ID`
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    create_date = as_date(mdy_hm(Create))
  ) %>% 
  filter(
    !is.na(PATHOLOGIST),
    create_date >= "2021-01-01" & 
      create_date <= "2021-03-31"
  ) %>% 
  group_by(PATHOLOGIST, `Result ID`) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(PATHOLOGIST) %>% 
  summarize(n = sum(n(), na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "PATHOLOGIST"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 Q3 Flow Cytology Reports

```{r flow 2020, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Flow Cytology Reports
# Number of reports signed

flow_raw %>% 
  filter(Year == '2020') %>% 
  select(Pathologist, `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  rename(n = `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "Pathologist"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```
<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2021 Q1 Flow Cytology Reports

```{r flow 2021, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Flow Cytology Reports
# Number of reports signed

flow_raw %>% 
  filter(Year == '2021') %>% 
  select(Pathologist, `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  rename(n = `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "Pathologist"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```
<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2020 Q3 Peripheral Blood Reviews

```{r peripheral-blood 2020, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Peripheral blood reviews

pblood %>% 
  filter(Year == '2020') %>% 
  select(Pathologist, `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  rename(n = `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "Pathologist"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```

<p style="page-break-before: always;"></p>

<br>

## 2021 Q1 Peripheral Blood Reviews

```{r peripheral-blood, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Peripheral blood reviews

pblood %>% 
  filter(Year == '2021') %>% 
  select(Pathologist, `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  rename(n = `Not Deleted`) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  gt(
    rowname_col = "Pathologist"
  ) %>% 
  fmt_missing(everything()) %>% 
  summary_rows(
    groups = NULL,
    columns = vars(n),
    fns = fns_labels,
    formatter = fmt_number,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightgreen"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n >= median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "indianred3"),
      cell_text(color = "white")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = vars(n),
      rows = n < median(n, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) %>% 
  tab_options(
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.size = px(11), 
    table.width = pct(55)
  )
```
